title: marsilea drummondii var. oxaloides
intro: Marsilea drummondii var. oxaloides, also known as the Australian Water Clover or Water Clover, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Marsileaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Marsilea drummondii var. oxaloides include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support kidney function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
